_note: Per-page hero + empathy overrides. Keyed by post slug. Where an entry exists the Tier-2 template uses these strings instead of falling back to the WP-derived defaults. Seeded with three proof pages (roofing / boise / seo local-gold-aeo); the remaining 221 pages render from defaults until each gets a hand-crafted hero pass.

roofing.hero_accent: STOP LOSING JOBS TO THE COMPANY WITH MORE GOOGLE REVIEWS.
roofing.hero_sub: When a homeowner finds a leak, they search, scroll, and call the top three companies that look legitimate. We make sure you're one of them.
roofing.empathy_heading: You do great work. The phone still
pains: Storms come through and the chasers from out of state get the jobs you should have won.
You're paying for Google Ads but the leads are tire-kickers and insurance shoppers.
Your competitor with thirty more reviews is winning the click before you even show up.
You can't tell which marketing dollar is actually bringing in roof tear-offs.
roofing.empathy_summary: It isn't your work. It's that homeowners decide before they call, and you're not in the decision.
roofing.stakes_neg: Another season of chasers winning storm jobs. Another month of paying for clicks that don't turn into roofs.
roofing.stakes_pos: You become the roofer homeowners and insurance adjusters know by name. The phone rings with real jobs, not tire-kickers.
roofing.cta_sub: Free 30-minute strategy call. We look at your Google profile, your reviews, your ads, and tell you exactly where the leak is.

boise.hero_accent: BE THE ONE CUSTOMERS CALL FIRST.
boise.hero_sub: Boise is growing fast and so is the competition. New people in town pick the business that looks established online. We make sure that's you.
boise.empathy_heading: You're great at what you do.
pains: New Boise residents are searching for what you sell and finding a competitor with better SEO.
Your ad budget feels like it disappears with nothing measurable to show.
Google Maps shows three businesses above yours and you don't know how to move up.
You're DIY-ing marketing on top of running the business and something always slips.
boise.empathy_summary: It isn't that Boise doesn't want what you sell. It's that the customers who want it find someone else first.
boise.stakes_neg: Boise keeps growing and the businesses with sharper marketing keep winning the new arrivals.
boise.stakes_pos: You become the Boise name people recommend, recognize, and call without checking three competitors first.
boise.cta_sub: Free 30-minute strategy call. I look at your site, your Google profile, and your ads. Tell you what's working, what isn't, and where to start.

seo__local-gold.hero_sub: A monthly SEO program built for local Idaho businesses, now tuned for AI search. Real keywords, real content, real reporting. No vanity rankings.
pains: Your last SEO company sent reports with rankings on keywords no real customer types.
Your competitors are showing up in Google AI Overviews and you're not.
Your Google Business Profile sits half-filled while reviews stack up for the shop down the street.
You can't tell if the SEO work is making the phone ring or just making invoices.
seo__local-gold.empathy_summary: Real SEO is local intent, AI visibility, and content that gets you cited. Not keyword stuffing.
seo__local-gold.stakes_neg: Another year invisible in the searches your customers are actually doing.
seo__local-gold.stakes_pos: You become the first local result, the AI-cited answer, and the business getting the calls.
seo__local-gold.cta_sub: Free 30-minute strategy call. We pull your current rankings, look at your Google profile, and tell you the three SEO moves that will move the needle.
